name: AttributionRequest
description: AttributionRequest schema from Amplitude Attribution API

api_key.description: The API key for the Amplitude project.

user_id.description: The user ID to attribute the campaign event to. Required unless device_id is present.

device_id.description: The device ID. Required unless user_id is present.

event_type.description: The type of attribution event, typically a campaign-related event such as install or re-engage.

platform.description: The platform of the device, such as iOS or Android.

region.description: The region or state of the user.

language.description: The language setting of the user.

adid.description: The Google Play Services advertising ID (Android).

user_properties.description: User property operations to set alongside the attribution event. Typically used to set campaign-related properties like utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign, utm_term, and utm_content.

event_properties.description: Additional properties associated with the attribution event such as campaign name, ad group, ad creative, and network.

time.description: The timestamp of the event in milliseconds since epoch.
